message:
chore: type annotation clarity, comment fix, cfg-gated test assertions

Minor cleanups across six files:

- channel/mpsc.rs, channel/session.rs: add explicit type annotations
  on intermediate let bindings before match on async reserve() results,
  improving type inference legibility with no behavioral change

- gen_server.rs: remove two redundant explicit type annotations on
  reply_permit bindings where the type is unambiguously inferred

- lab/oracle/eprocess.rs: fix comment — replace hardcoded "1.0" with
  "max_evalue" to match the actual variable name used in the assertion

- lab/oracle/evidence.rs: split hardcoded assertion of 21 oracle
  entries into two cfg-gated assertions (17 without messaging-fabric
  feature, 21 with) to fix test failures when the feature is absent

- messaging/control.rs: rename test function from
  "rejects_mismatched_lag_sketch_delta" to
  "applies_mismatched_lag_sketch_delta_to_break_retry_loop" to
  accurately describe the corrected test behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
